pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release target from Java 11 to Java 17 to enforce compilation against the new JDK.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM to version 2.15.3.Final to align with Java 17 support and latest framework features.
Add quarkus-agroal dependency for connection pooling support.
Add quarkus-jdbc-postgresql dependency for PostgreSQL database connectivity.
Add quarkus-flyway dependency for database migration management.
Add quarkus-config-yaml dependency to support YAML-based configuration files.
Add quarkus-hibernate-orm-rest-data-panache dependency for REST data exposure via Panache.
Add quarkus-resteasy-jsonb dependency for JSON-B serialization in REST endpoints.
Add quarkus-smallrye-jwt dependency for JWT authentication support.
Add quarkus-smallrye-openapi dependency for OpenAPI documentation generation.
Add lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java entities.
Add quarkus-hibernate-validator dependency for Bean Validation support.
Add quarkus-hibernate-orm-panache dependency for simplified Hibernate ORM usage.
Add quarkus-test-common dependency for testing utilities.
Add testcontainers jdbc dependency for integration testing with databases.
Add testcontainers postgresql dependency for integration testing with PostgreSQL.
Add maven-source-plugin to attach source JARs during the build.
Add maven-javadoc-plugin to attach Javadoc JARs during the build.
Add nexus-staging-maven-plugin to automate deployment to Maven Central.
Add maven-gpg-plugin to sign artifacts for Maven Central release.
Update groupId, artifactId, and version to reflect the new project identity (agr_mati).
Configure distribution management URLs for deploying snapshots and releases to OSSRH.
Add SCM configuration to link the project to its Git repository.
Add MIT License metadata to the POM.
Add developer metadata to the POM.
Update surefire-plugin version to 3.0.0-M7 for better compatibility with newer JDKs.

README.md.general_idea: Replaced generic Quarkus boilerplate documentation with project-specific setup, testing, and deployment instructions.
README.md.human_impl: Removed 'Provided Code' and 'Native executable' sections; added 'Test MaTI', 'Creating new subdomains', and 'Releases' sections.

src/main/resources/META-INF/resources/in.general_idea: Update the displayed GroupId in the index.html to reflect the actual project organization.
